answers: Habit tracking: mark off each day you complete a habit. Visual streak motivates you to not break the chain.
Apps: Habitica (gamified), Streaks, Loop Habit Tracker, or simple paper calendar with X marks.
Build habits: start tiny (1 push-up not 50), stack on existing habits, never miss twice, and be patient (21-66 days to form).
Habit tracker ki: daily habits track kora r tool. Streak dekhle motivation baray.
